meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2025 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: 2025 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, event entries, and research candidates.
Entry lists, schedules, programs, and result rows are event-entry/result sources, not confirmed athlete achievement summaries by themselves.
Spring Ebetsu and summer Kitami entries now include separate official HPA source locators found on the HPA home page, in addition to result PDFs.
